rows.Product: TNVitamins Ultra Potent Complete Green Superfood Capsules and Doctor's Pride Complete Green Superfood Ultra Potent Moringa Capsules (120 count, dietary supplement)
rows.Reason: Potential Salmonella contamination
rows.Notes: Manual add 2026-05-27 by operator — FDA announcement published 2026-05-26 16:24 UTC. Total Nutrition Inc. of Deer Park, NY voluntarily recalling TNVitamins Ultra Potent Complete Green Superfood and Doctor's Pride Complete Green Superfood Ultra Potent Moringa Capsules (120 count). PRECAUTIONARY recall — no illnesses reported from Total Nutrition's specific products. FDA/CDC notified company that products may be implicated in ongoing CDC moringa-supplement Salmonella outbreak investigation (Typhimurium + Newport strains; 65+ illnesses across 28 states with 14 hospitalizations linked to related products: Live It Up Super Greens by Superfoods Inc. recalled 2026-01-15, Why Not Natural Moringa recalled 2026-01-28). Distribution and sale halted. Scraper gap: fda_listing.py title-only pathogen detection silently dropped this URL — slug contains no pathogen keyword (same gap as SKS Copack 2026-05-23).
